xwikidoc.name: Translations
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.title: Translations
xwikidoc.content:
openproject.config.addNewConnection=Add new connection openproject.config.cancel=Cancel openproject.config.clientId=Client ID openproject.config.clientIdDescription.first=Go to OpenProject Administration > Wiki connection. openproject.config.clientIdDescription.second=Start the setup & copy the OpenProject OAuth Client ID. Paste it below. openproject.config.clientSecret=Client Secret openproject.config.clientSecretDescription=In OpenProject Administration > Wiki connection, copy the OpenProject OAuth Client Secret. Paste it below. openproject.config.connectionName=Connection Name openproject.config.connectionNameDescription=Set an easily recognizable name for the OpenProject instance you're connecting to. openproject.config.connectionsDescription=Defines access to OpenProject instances and associates a Connection Name to each. The Connection Name can then be used in various Open Project Components whenever an OpenProject instance is required, such as in a parameter for the OpenProject Macro. openproject.config.connectionsTitle=OpenProject Instance Connections openproject.config.save=Save openproject.config.save.saved=Connection {0} has been saved! openproject.config.save.errorOccurred=An error occurred while saving the connection! openproject.config.createConnection=Create new connection openproject.config.updateConnection=Update connection openproject.config.delete=Delete openproject.config.delete.info=Delete connection openproject.config.delete.deleted=Connection {0} has been deleted! openproject.config.delete.description.first=You will delete connection {0} openproject.config.delete.description.second=Are you sure you want to proceed? openproject.config.delete.errorOccurred=An error occurred while deleting the connection! openproject.config.noRights=No Rights openproject.config.serverURL=Server URL openproject.config.serverURLDescription=Copy the link from your browser’s adress bar when you are in your OpenProject instance. Paste it below. openproject.config.serverUrl=Server URL openproject.config.update=Update openproject.config.update=Update openproject.config.fillInAllFields=Please fill in all fields! openproject.config.update.notUpdated=Connection {0} was not updated! openproject.config.update.updated=Connection {0} has been updated! openproject.config.isAuthorized.true=Authorized openproject.config.isAuthorized.false=Not yet authorized openproject.livedatalabels.isAuthorized=Authorized? openproject.livedatalabels.actions = Actions openproject.livedatalabels.clientId=Client ID openproject.livedatalabels.clientSecret=Client Secret openproject.livedatalabels.connectionName=Connection name openproject.livedatalabels.serverURL=Server URL
openproject.livedata.action.view.done=Work Package loaded successfully openproject.livedata.action.view.inprogress=Loading Work Package openproject.livedata.action.view.error=Failed to load Work Package
openproject.config.stylejob.title=Color and styling openproject.config.stylejob.trigger.title=Color sync openproject.config.stylejob.trigger.hint=Sync the property colors between the Work Items displayed in XWiki and the ones displayed in Open Project. You should be authorized to the Open Project instances before running this job. openproject.config.stylejob.trigger.button=Sync colors
openproject.createworkpackage.highlight=Open Project openproject.createworkpackage.highlight.single=Create work package openproject.createworkpackage.highlight.multiple=Create work packages from table openproject.createworkpackage.modal.cancel=Cancel openproject.createworkpackage.modal.create.single=Create work package openproject.createworkpackage.modal.create.multiple=Create work packages openproject.createworkpackage.modal.single.description=This form allows you to create a new work package in OpenProject based on the selected text. openproject.createworkpackage.modal.multiple.description=This form allows you to create multiple work packages in OpenProject based on the selected table. openproject.createworkpackage.modal.mapping.title=OpenProject Mapping openproject.createworkpackage.modal.mapping.description=Map the columns of your table to OpenProject fields. Each mapping will map the values of a column to the OpenProject field of your choice. openproject.createworkpackage.modal.mapping.add=+ Add mapping openproject.createworkpackage.modal.mapping.selectColumn=Select table column openproject.createworkpackage.modal.mapping.selectField=Select OpenProject field openproject.createworkpackage.modal.mapping.isMappedTo=is mapped to openproject.createworkpackage.modal.multiple.preview=The following work packages will be created openproject.createworkpackage.modal.select.all=Select all
openproject.createworkpackage.modal.title.single=Create Single Work Package openproject.createworkpackage.modal.title.multiple=Create Multiple Work Packages
openproject.createworkpackage.notify.fillRequiredFields=Please fill the required fields highlighted. openproject.createworkpackage.notify.selectProject=Please select a project. openproject.createworkpackage.notify.selectConnection=Please select a connection. openproject.createworkpackage.notify.single.success=The work package was created successfully! openproject.createworkpackage.notify.single.error=Failed to create the work package! openproject.createworkpackage.notify.multiple.fillRequiredFields=Please fill the required fields highlighted in selected work packages. openproject.createworkpackage.notify.multiple.noSelection=No work packages selected. openproject.createworkpackage.notify.multiple.allSuccess=All work packages created successfully! openproject.createworkpackage.notify.multiple.partialSuccess=Some work packages were created, some failed. openproject.createworkpackage.notify.multiple.error=Failed to create work packages! openproject.createworkpackage.notify.inputs.error=An error occurred while trying to create the inputs! openproject.createworkpackage.notify.values.error=An error occurred while trying to set the available values!
openproject.createworkpackage.utils.selectPlaceholder=Select {0}... openproject.createworkpackage.utils.inputPlaceholder=Enter {0}... openproject.createworkpackage.utils.selectProjectPlaceholder=Select project... openproject.createworkpackage.utils.loadProjects.error=An error occurred while trying to get the project options!
openproject.createworkpackage.macro.notify.fillRequiredFields=Please fill in all required fields! openproject.createworkpackage.macro.notify.selectConnection=Please select a connection! openproject.createworkpackage.macro.notify.selectProject=Please select a project! openproject.createworkpackage.macro.notify.inputs.error=An error occurred while trying to create the inputs! openproject.createworkpackage.macro.notify.submit.noCkeditor=Work package created successfully! Please insert it manually as CKEditor instance was not found. openproject.createworkpackage.macro.notify.submit.success=Work package created and inserted successfully! openproject.createworkpackage.macro.notify.submit.error=An error occurred while trying to create the work package!
